title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Bytesnap Ltd
body: "Application number 5395  Applicant Bytesnap Design Limited objected to the name used by Bytesnap Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.   This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 1 December 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Bytesnap Ltd is changed to 16151657 Ltd.  "
